lead: This machine has separate lines for cz, at, and reset. Decide the current route first, then use the checker.

summaryBoxes.label: Base plan
summaryBoxes.value: Keep cz, at, and reset on separate lines.

summaryBoxes.label: Note
summaryBoxes.value: Do not read cz and at as the same route.

factTable: Judge after the current route is identified.

sections.title: How to use
body: The checker changes with the selected route.
Pick the route first, then compare the result card and the summary table.

sections.title: Memo
body: If the route is unclear, use the safer line.
This article only reorganizes the current checker rules.
